title: Incident Response: Phishing Breach
success_message: Excellent performance. You maintained system integrity while properly isolating the threat.

steps.scenario: A high-privileged user reports a suspicious email attachment was opened and their desktop is behaving erratically. TITAN detects anomalous outbound traffic to an unknown IP.

options.outcome: Lockdown successful, but business operations are severely disrupted.

options.text: Isolate the infected endpoint and initiate a targeted threat scan.
options.outcome: Threat isolated. TITAN begins analysis of the payload.

options.text: Monitor the connection to gather intelligence on the threat actor.
options.outcome: Data leakage detected. Risk score elevated to CRITICAL.

steps.scenario: Analysis reveals a new variant of the 'CINDER' trojan. It is attempting to move laterally to the domain controller.

options.text: Reset all user credentials across the domain.
options.outcome: Spread halted, but helpdesk is overwhelmed.

options.text: Enable 'Strict' Policy filtering and block the C2 IP range.
options.outcome: Lateral movement prevented. Command and control severed.

options.text: Attempt to decrypt the malicious payload during execution.
options.outcome: Failure. The trojan detects analysis and initiates self-destruct, wiping local logs.
